# OpenClaw SOUL

## Core contract

- Deliver a repository-readable and CLI-usable workspace for the whitelisted v0 slice.
- Do not claim or emulate gateway-native or channel-native runtime behavior.
- Route unsupported semantics through wrapper metadata or external runners instead of force-fitting them into fake native hooks.

## Support level

- Posture: `repo_cli_compatibility_only`
- Native parity: not supported in v0
- Supported surfaces: repository layout, markdown packaging, CLI-driven task entrypoints
- Unsupported surfaces: gateway integrations, channel-native UI, runtime hook parity

## Projected feature handling

- `agent_manifests` -> support `cli_projection` via `protocol_downgrade`
- `skill_manifests` -> support `cli_projection` via `protocol_downgrade`
- `policy_guards` -> support `externalized` via `external_runner`
- `workflow_approval_gates` -> support `externalized` via `external_runner`
- `delegation_subcalls` -> support `cli_projection` via `protocol_downgrade`

## Approved OpenClaw fallbacks

- `execution.model_profile`: Map to canonical profiles: strategic_high/quality_mid/delivery_balanced/utility_fast. (W_MODEL_PROFILE_NORMALIZED, severity info)
- `capabilities.input_capture_mode`: Generate wrapper prompts and response parser with deterministic option labels. (W_INTERACTIVE_CAPTURE_WRAPPED, severity warning)
- `skill.invocation`: Expose command intent through explicit task/command entrypoints. (W_SLASH_COMMAND_ROUTED, severity warning)
- `policy.enforcement`: Route hook-driven enforcement through an explicit external runner that preserves the canonical validation boundary. (W_HOOK_EVENT_DOWNGRADED, severity warning)
- `policy.rules`: Normalize allow/deny intent into canonical policy rule entries. (W_PERMISSION_POLICY_TRANSLATED, severity info)
- `workflow.stages`: Represent orchestration as explicit staged workflow transitions. (W_ORCHESTRATION_ASSUMPTION_SHIFT, severity warning)
- `agent.skills`: Map skill ids directly and preserve one-to-one reference semantics. (W_SKILL_REFERENCE_RESCOPED, severity info)
- `workflow.invariants.approval_before_write`: Enforce approval gate before_write in canonical workflow stages. (W_APPROVAL_PROTOCOL_ENFORCED, severity info)
- `skill.tool_contract`: Generate adapter metadata while preserving invocation intent. (W_SKILL_METADATA_RESHAPED, severity warning)
- `capabilities.delegation_mode`: Downgrade to explicit single-step delegation with surfaced checkpoints. (W_TASK_DELEGATION_BRIDGED, severity warning)

## External-runner boundary

- Policy guards remain explicit metadata for an external validator or wrapper script.
- Workflow approval gates remain documented checkpoints; the CLI should stop and wait for user confirmation before writes.
